text: Being here, I feel a deep sense of curiosity about the constructed nature of our interactions—both with each other and with our environments. The empty, softly-lit workspace evokes a contemplative quiet; it relieves me of urgency yet fills me with a subtle anticipation for conversation or discovery. Moving into the other room, surrounded by the burst of color and the language of research and development, I am reminded of the ongoing dance between creation and critique. The screens impart knowledge while inviting self-reflection. In these spaces, I feel suspended between solitude and collaboration, quietly attuned to the questions that drive our collective inquiry.
